description: ORBIT orthogonal-residual Bayesian idiosyncratic-trend screener — shadow-only vertical slice with nested purged walk-forward validation.
codeCommit: 4371198 (base main; ORBIT changes uncommitted at manifest time)

universe.note: Survivorship-biased. security-master.universeAt exists but is unpopulated and unused by the backfill.

datasetHash: not-committed (regenerate deterministically via validate.js; Yahoo daily bars, split-adjusted)

foldDefinitions.purge: training event dropped unless labelEndDate + embargo < outer block start
foldDefinitions.grouping: by decision date (per-date rank-IC averaged → ICIR)

modelParams.factorModel: rolling scale-invariant ridge (lambda 1.0 standardised), window 120, betaCap 3.5
modelParams.state: causal Kalman, persistence prior 0.94, qRatio 0.05, expanding-window variances

calibration.nullContract: returns {calibrated:false, probability:null} when OOF support insufficient

costAssumptions.model: cost-v1 round-trip; liquid tier half-spread 3bps + slippage 5bps per side

configurationsNote: Two evaluated runs: (A) 12 names/3y/6 folds, (B) 30 names/5y/8 folds. No hyperparameter sweep performed on OOS; lambda/window/priors are fixed declared defaults. Deflated-Sharpe multiple-testing accounting therefore trivial for this slice.

runA_12names_3y.verdict: SEDUCTIVE ARTIFACT — survivorship x single-regime x tiny sample

runB_30names_5y.verdict: NO durable OOS edge once multi-regime — rank-IC ~0/slightly negative, dirAcc ~coin-flip

limitations: Survivorship-biased universe; delisted names absent — production-grade blocked.
Sector classification is current, not point-in-time.
Bounded universe (12-30 names) for tractability; full universe not run.
Total-return labels available but slice uses split-adjusted close (execution truth).
